author: DominicVainMod
content:
Scam Warning  

Please be advised that we do not have any collaboration with MagicEden at this time. Below is a SCAM going around advertising a collaboration with the promise of ships. Any official partnership or collaboration will always come from official channels.

DO NOT CLICK THIS LINK
